debug_info.goal:
f : ℝ → ℝ
a b : ℝ
hab : a < b
n k : ℕ
hn : n ≠ 0
hk : k ≠ 0
ε δ : ℝ
hε : ε > 0
hδ : δ > 0
hunif : ∀ x ∈ Set.Icc a b, ∀ y ∈ Set.Icc a b, |y - x| < δ → |f y - f x| < ε
hfine : 2 * (b - a) / ↑n < δ
j : ℕ
hj : j ∈ Finset.range n
ℓ : ℕ
hℓ : ℓ ∈ Finset.range k
⊢ |(↑ℓ + 1) * (b - a) / (↑n * ↑k) - (b - a) / ↑n| ≤ 2 * (b - a) / ↑n

failed_attempts:
have hba : b - a > 0 := by linarith
    have hn' : (n : ℝ) > 0 := Nat.cast_pos.mpr (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn)
    have hk' : (k : ℝ) > 0 := Nat.cast_pos.mpr (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hk)
    have hnk : (n : ℝ) * k > 0 := mul_pos hn' hk'
    have hℓk : (ℓ : ℝ) + 1 ≤ k := by
      have := Finset.mem_range.mp hℓ
      exact_mod_cast this
    have key : (↑ℓ + 1) * (b - a) / (↑n * ↑k) - (b - a) / ↑n =
      (b - a) / (↑n * ↑k) * ((↑ℓ + 1) - ↑k) := by
      field_simp
    rw [key, abs_mul, abs_of_pos (div_pos hba hnk)]
    have h1 : |((ℓ : ℝ) + 1) - (↑k : ℝ)| ≤ (↑k : ℝ) := by
      rw [show ((ℓ : ℝ) + 1) - (↑k : ℝ) = -((↑k : ℝ) - (↑ℓ + 1)) from by ring]
      rw [abs_neg]
      rw [abs_of_nonneg (by linarith : (↑k : ℝ) - (↑ℓ + 1) ≥ 0)]
      linarith
    calc (b - a) / (↑n * ↑k) * |((ℓ : ℝ) + 1) - ↑k|
        ≤ (b - a) / (↑n * ↑k) * (↑k : ℝ) := by
          apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left h1 (le_of_lt (div_pos hba hnk))
      _ = (b - a) / ↑n := by field_simp
      _ ≤ 2 * (b - a) / ↑n := by
          rw [show 2 * (b - a) / ↑n = (b - a) / ↑n + (b - a) / ↑n from by ring]
          linarith [div_pos hba hn']
